title: Microsoft Intune Managed Device
description: Devices that are managed or pre-enrolled through Intune. Represents a physical or virtual device managed by the Microsoft Intune service via the Microsoft Graph API. Based on the microsoft.graph.managedDevice resource type.

@odata.type.description: The OData type annotation for the managed device resource.

id.description: Unique identifier for the device. This property is read-only.

userId.description: Unique identifier for the user associated with the device. This property is read-only.

deviceName.description: Name of the device. This property is read-only.

managedDeviceOwnerType.description: Ownership of the device. Can be 'company' or 'personal'.

deviceActionResults.description: List of ComplexType deviceActionResult objects. This property is read-only.

enrolledDateTime.description: Enrollment time of the device. Supports $filter operator 'lt' and 'gt'. This property is read-only.

lastSyncDateTime.description: The date and time that the device last completed a successful sync with Intune. Supports $filter operator 'lt' and 'gt'. This property is read-only.

operatingSystem.description: Operating system of the device. Windows, iOS, etc. This property is read-only.

complianceState.description: Compliance state of the device. Examples: Compliant, Conflict, Error, etc. Default is unknown. Supports $filter operator 'eq' and 'or'. This property is read-only.

jailBroken.description: Whether the device is jail broken or rooted. Default is an empty string. This property is read-only.

managementAgent.description: Management channel of the device. Examples: Intune, EAS, etc. Default is unknown. This property is read-only.

osVersion.description: Operating system version of the device. This property is read-only.

easActivated.description: Whether the device is Exchange ActiveSync activated. This property is read-only.

easDeviceId.description: Exchange ActiveSync Id of the device. This property is read-only.

easActivationDateTime.description: Exchange ActivationSync activation time of the device. This property is read-only.

azureADRegistered.description: Whether the device is Azure Active Directory registered. This property is read-only.

deviceEnrollmentType.description: Enrollment type of the device. This property is read-only.

activationLockBypassCode.description: The code that allows the Activation Lock on managed device to be bypassed. This property is read-only.

emailAddress.description: Email(s) for the user associated with the device. This property is read-only.

azureADDeviceId.description: The unique identifier for the Azure Active Directory device. Read only. This property is read-only.

deviceRegistrationState.description: Device registration state. This property is read-only.

deviceCategoryDisplayName.description: Device category display name. Default is an empty string. This property is read-only.

isSupervised.description: Device supervised status. This property is read-only.

exchangeLastSuccessfulSyncDateTime.description: Last time the device contacted Exchange. This property is read-only.

exchangeAccessState.description: The Access State of the device in Exchange. This property is read-only.

exchangeAccessStateReason.description: The reason for the device's access state in Exchange. This property is read-only.

remoteAssistanceSessionUrl.description: URL that allows a Remote Assistance session to be established with the device. This property is read-only.

remoteAssistanceSessionErrorDetails.description: An error string that identifies issues when creating Remote Assistance session objects. This property is read-only.

isEncrypted.description: Device encryption status. This property is read-only.

userPrincipalName.description: Device user principal name. This property is read-only.

model.description: Model of the device. This property is read-only.

manufacturer.description: Manufacturer of the device. This property is read-only.

imei.description: IMEI (International Mobile Equipment Identity). This property is read-only.

complianceGracePeriodExpirationDateTime.description: The DateTime when device compliance grace period expires. This property is read-only.

serialNumber.description: Serial number of the device. This property is read-only.

phoneNumber.description: Phone number of the device. This property is read-only.

androidSecurityPatchLevel.description: Android security patch level. This property is read-only.

userDisplayName.description: User display name. This property is read-only.

configurationManagerClientEnabledFeature.description: ConfigrMgr client enabled features. This property is read-only.

wiFiMacAddress.description: Wi-Fi MAC address. This property is read-only.

deviceHealthAttestationState.description: The device health attestation state. This property is read-only.

subscriberCarrier.description: Subscriber carrier. This property is read-only.

meid.description: MEID (Mobile Equipment Identifier). This property is read-only.

totalStorageSpaceInBytes.description: Total storage in bytes. This property is read-only.

freeStorageSpaceInBytes.description: Free storage in bytes. Default value is 0. This property is read-only.

managedDeviceName.description: Automatically generated name to identify a device. Can be overwritten to a user friendly name.

partnerReportedThreatState.description: Indicates the threat state of a device when a Mobile Threat Defense partner is in use by the account and device. Read only. This property is read-only.

requireUserEnrollmentApproval.description: Reports if the managed iOS device is user approval enrollment. This property is read-only.

managementCertificateExpirationDate.description: Reports device management certificate expiration date. This property is read-only.

iccid.description: Integrated Circuit Card Identifier, the SIM card's unique identification number. This property is read-only.

udid.description: Unique Device Identifier for iOS and macOS devices. This property is read-only.

notes.description: Notes on the device created by IT Admin. Default is null.

ethernetMacAddress.description: Indicates Ethernet MAC Address of the device. This property is read-only.

physicalMemoryInBytes.description: Total memory in bytes. Default is 0. This property is read-only.

enrollmentProfileName.description: Name of the enrollment profile assigned to the device. Default value is empty string. This property is read-only.

deviceActionResult.title: Device Action Result
deviceActionResult.description: Device action result returned from performing an action on a managed device.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: Time the action state was last updated.

configurationManagerClientEnabledFeature.title: Configuration Manager Client Enabled Features
configurationManagerClientEnabledFeature.description: Represents the enabled features of the Configuration Manager client co-managed with Intune.

inventory.description: Whether inventory is managed by Intune.

modernApps.description: Whether modern application is managed by Intune.

resourceAccess.description: Whether resource access is managed by Intune.

deviceConfiguration.description: Whether device configuration is managed by Intune.

compliancePolicy.description: Whether compliance policy is managed by Intune.

windowsUpdateForBusiness.description: Whether Windows Update for Business is managed by Intune.

deviceHealthAttestationState.title: Device Health Attestation State
deviceHealthAttestationState.description: The device health attestation state, providing hardware-based security and health status information.

lastUpdateDateTime.description: The timestamp of the last update.

issuedDateTime.description: The DateTime when device was evaluated or issued to MDM.

attestationIdentityKey.description: TWhen an Attestation Identity Key (AIK) is present on a device, it indicates that the device has an endorsement key (EK) certificate.

resetCount.description: The number of times a PC device has hibernated or resumed.

restartCount.description: The number of times a PC device has rebooted.

dataExcutionPolicy.description: DEP policy defines a set of hardware and software technologies that perform additional checks on memory.

bitLockerStatus.description: On or Off of BitLocker Drive Encryption.

bootManagerVersion.description: The version of the Boot Manager.

codeIntegrityCheckVersion.description: The version of the code integrity check.

secureBoot.description: When Secure Boot is enabled, the core components must have correct cryptographic signatures.

bootDebugging.description: When bootDebugging is enabled, it is used to provide diagnostic information during development.

operatingSystemKernelDebugging.description: When operatingSystemKernelDebugging is enabled, it allows kernel debugging.

codeIntegrity.description: When code integrity is enabled, code execution is restricted to integrity verified code.

testSigning.description: When test signing is allowed, the device does not enforce signature validation during boot.

safeMode.description: Safe mode is a troubleshooting option for Windows that starts the computer in a limited state.

windowsPE.description: Operating system running with limited services that is used to prepare a computer for Windows.

earlyLaunchAntiMalwareDriverProtection.description: ELAM provides protection for the computers in your network when they start up.

virtualSecureMode.description: VSM is a container that protects high value assets from a compromised kernel.

pcrHashAlgorithm.description: Informational attribute that identifies the HASH algorithm that was used by TPM.

bootAppSecurityVersion.description: The security version number of the Boot Application.

bootManagerSecurityVersion.description: The security version number of the Boot Manager.

tpmVersion.description: The security version number of the Boot Application.

pcr0.description: A fingerprint of the legacy BIOS configuration measured in PCR[0].

secureBootConfigurationPolicyFingerPrint.description: Fingerprint of the Custom Secure Boot Configuration Policy.

codeIntegrityPolicy.description: The Code Integrity policy that is controlling the security of the boot environment.

bootRevisionListInfo.description: The Boot Revision List that was loaded during initial boot on the attested device.

operatingSystemRevListInfo.description: The Operating System Revision List that was loaded during initial boot on the attested device.

healthStatusMismatchInfo.description: This attribute appears if DHA-Service detects an integrity issue.

healthAttestationSupportedStatus.description: This attribute indicates if DHA is supported for the device.
